data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for fast historical trend querying.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for fast historical trend querying without heavy cross-domain joins. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this capability. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, indicating a gap in the evidence needed to assess this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks for fast historical trend querying.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
